name: GOLFTEC Mission Valley
address: 7510 Hazard Center Dr Suite 417, San Diego, CA 92108
about: GOLFTEC is a high-tech golf training studio specializing in data-driven instruction and club fitting. They utilize advanced motion capture technology, including OPTIMOTION, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide precise feedback on swing mechanics. The centers offer structured lesson programs, practice memberships with guided training plans, and expert club fitting services designed to optimize performance and equipment for golfers of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture and launch monitors for precise swing analysis
Personalized lesson plans and coaching tailored to individual goals and skill levels
Data-driven club fitting that provides an average of 21 more yards off the tee
Structured practice memberships with coach-designed training plans for accelerated improvement

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides clubs for lessons and fittings. During a fitting, they will help you find the perfect custom-fit clubs to match your swing.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services at GOLFTEC locations. It is recommended to contact the specific center directly for their policy on outside food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While GOLFTEC does not operate traditional 18-hole golf courses, their simulators allow for virtual play. The time to complete 18 virtual holes would depend on the software and number of players, but a typical round would take approximately 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth, making it a suitable environment for young golfers to learn and improve their game with professional coaching.
